business_meaning.pd_internal_selected_threshold: Threshold interno de screening/seleccion PD usado en busqueda y analisis tecnico.
business_meaning.pd_internal_fallback_threshold: Fallback interno tomado de la policy de fairness durante la busqueda de threshold PD.
business_meaning.fairness_primary_threshold: Threshold operativo principal para auditoria de fairness y narrativa de aprobacion.
business_meaning.decision_policy_global_threshold: Threshold operativo global aplicado por la policy de decision/aprobacion.
